page.compatibility.tooltip: Exclusions for specific mods that have unusual spawn rules
page.compatibility.paragraph: Some mods spawn items in unusual ways that can make the grabber overpowered. Use these toggles to automatically exclude known problematic items from those mods.
config.sunberry-village-exclusions.toolt: Prevents the grabber from collecting ore nodes and supply crates that Sunberry Village spawns in a non-standard way. Disable this if you want the grabber to collect those items.
config.visit-mt-vapius-exclusions.toolti: Prevents the grabber from collecting resource nodes (ores, stumps, weeds) from the Visit Mount Vapius mod. These are breakable objects, not forage.
section.crop-harvesting.tooltip: These options are only considered if 'Harvest Crops' is enabled
config.harvest-crops-indoor-pots.tooltip: This is ignored if 'Harvest Crops' is disabled
config.harvest-flowers.tooltip: This is ignored if 'Harvest crops' is disabled
config.harvest-range.tooltip: This is ignored if 'Harvest Crops' is disabled. Set to -1 to use infinite range. This ONLY affects crop harvesting.
config.harvest-range-mode.tooltip: 'Walk': the distance is the walking distance (in four directions) from the grabber, becoming a diamond shape. 'Square': the distance is a square like a sprinkler. Covers more area than 'Walk'.
config.collect-animal-products.tooltip: Collects eggs, milk, wool, and other animal products from barns and coops. Also picks up dropped items like eggs from the floor.
config.grab-farm-cave-mushrooms.tooltip: This will also work for mushroom boxes placed outside the farm cave
config.collect-buried-items.tooltip: Collects items buried by Farm Type Manager (used by SVE, WAG, and other mods). Without this, those items are consumed and replaced with wrong drops.
config.fell-stumps.tooltip: Chops large stumps and hollow logs in all locations for hardwood.
config.collect-forage.tooltip: Picks up forage items like leeks, daffodils, and spring onions from the ground
config.collect-debris.tooltip: Picks up items dropped as debris on the ground, such as monster loot, fallen items, and other drops that bounce around before settling.
section.machine-collection.tooltip: Automatically collect finished outputs from supported machines
config.collect-machine-outputs.tooltip: Automatically collects finished outputs from supported machines and deposits them into nearby auto-grabbers
config.collect-crab-pots.tooltip: This is ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-bee-houses.tooltip: This is ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-tappers.tooltip: Collects from both regular and heavy tappers. This is ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.report-yield.tooltip: Logs to the SMAPI console the yield of each auto grabber
config.debug-logging.tooltip: Logs detailed trace info to the SMAPI log file for troubleshooting
config.gain-experience.tooltip: Gain appropriate experience as if you foraged or harvested yourself
config.skip-festival-locations.tooltip: Prevents auto-grabbers from collecting items in festival and temporary event locations, including during active festivals
config.hourly-collection.tooltip: When enabled, grabbers sweep all locations every in-game hour to collect items. When disabled, items are only collected at the start and end of each day. Ore panning still runs hourly regardless of this setting.
config.excluded-items.tooltip: A comma-separated list of qualified item IDs that the grabber should never collect. For example, '(O)859' to exclude the Lucky Ring. You can find item IDs on the Stardew Valley wiki or with Lookup Anything.
config.global-grabber-mode.tooltip: 'Hover': hover over a grabber and press the fire key to make it collect from all locations. 'All': designate a grabber (open it and tap the star button, or hover + press designate key), then fire it to collect globally.
config.auto-fire-global-grabber.tooltip: When enabled, the designated global grabber automatically collects from all locations at the start of each day. Only used in All mode. Great for mobile users.
config.fire-global-grabber.tooltip: Press to trigger the designated or hovered grabber to collect items from all locations. Only works when Global Grabber Mode is set to All or Hover.
config.designate-global-grabber.tooltip: Hover over an auto-grabber and press this key to designate it as the global grabber. Only used in All mode. On mobile, use the star button in the auto-grabber menu instead.
config.global-button-x-offset.tooltip: Adjust the horizontal position of the Global Grabber star button in the auto-grabber menu. Use this if it overlaps with buttons from other mods.
config.global-button-y-offset.tooltip: Adjust the vertical position of the Global Grabber star button in the auto-grabber menu. Use this if it overlaps with buttons from other mods.
config.rename-button-x-offset.tooltip: Adjust the horizontal position of the Name button in the auto-grabber menu.
config.rename-button-y-offset.tooltip: Adjust the vertical position of the Name button in the auto-grabber menu.
config.skipped-locations-link.tooltip: Choose which game locations to skip when auto-grabbing
config.skipped-locations-paragraph: Toggle locations on or off. Disabled locations will be skipped by all auto-grabbers.
config.enable-all.tooltip: Toggle all locations on or off at once
config.select-visited-only.tooltip: Enables only locations you've visited and skips the rest. If you discover new locations, toggle this again to update.
config.no-save-loaded: Load a save file to see available locations.
hud.designate-first: Designate a global grabber first by opening an auto-grabber and pressing the star button, or by hovering over it and pressing the designate key.
hud.hover-over-grabber: You need to hover your cursor over an auto-grabber to designate it.
hud.no-longer-global: This auto-grabber is no longer the Global Grabber.
hud.now-global: This auto-grabber is now the Global Grabber!
naming.title: Name this auto-grabber
